text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On stage after winning her exhibition<n>race, Silence
Suzuka hears cries of<n>"welcome home" from her
fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strong desire to return to them<n>again and
again suddenly wells up in<n>her, and she relates
that emotion to<n>the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, a few students stop by<n>as we're
doing publicity work to<n>express interest. One of
them,<n>however, loudly disapproves of our<n>project.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She argues that a concert where<n>everyone gets to
sing would be<n>tantamount to a denial of their hard
work. Her words leave a heavy<n>silence in their
wake.
